projectName: Canon Boundary Guard for GPT Projects
projectDescription: A source-bundle frame for ChatGPT Projects that keeps uploaded files, chat history, instructions, hypotheses, and generated drafts separated from accepted canon through a simulated provenance-control gate.
keyFeatures: Five-layer provenance classification (L0–L3 + L1A) that keeps inspected evidence separate from chat, assumptions, and agent-control instructions
Simulated PreToolUse gate that runs before persistent writes, Canvas updates, Project Source candidates, and artifact promotion
Deterministic save labels ([SAFE TO SAVE], [DO NOT SAVE - L1/L3 PRESENT], [STATE DELTA - ...], [DRAFT - REQUIRES OPERATOR APPROVAL])
SESSION_STATE JSON file with sequence numbering, active L0 sources, authorized deltas, open conflicts, and pending decisions
CANON_STATE_DELTA snapshot blocks for durable state recovery and operator audit trail
Three operating modes: Mode A (mechanical L0), Mode B (semantic L0 reorganization), Mode C (L1/L1A/L2/L3 promotion requiring explicit authorization)
Mandatory Status Check bootstrap before the first substantive output in any new Project session
Source-staged extraction rules for zip bundles in /mnt/data with anchor identity and hash requirements
Read-only recovery mode when no valid SESSION_STATE is available
Optional Python validators: validate_state.py, extract_proof.py, artifact_fingerprint.py
publicApiSurface: Source classes: L0 (inspected evidence), L1 (chat/memory), L1A (operator-authorized delta), L2 (agent-control), L3 (model prior)
Operating modes: Mode A, Mode B, Mode C
Save labels: [SAFE TO SAVE], [DO NOT SAVE - L1/L3 PRESENT], [STATE DELTA - SAVE/PASTE ONLY AS RECOVERY MATERIAL], [DRAFT - REQUIRES OPERATOR APPROVAL]
Full dossier fields: Target, Mode, Evidence, Authorized delta, Rejected shaping, Rejected model prior, Conflicts, Decision needed
Proof-of-read fields: source identity, exact section heading, first 5 words, last 5 words, line range
